73.reason: Error: Missing reset of `begin = 0;` after processing a word. This causes subsequent non‑letter characters to incorrectly treat an empty string as a new word, inserting empty entries into the array. Add `begin = 0;` after this line to prevent false word creation.

This causes subsequent non‑letter characters to incorrectly treat an empty string as a new word, inserting empty entries into the array. Add `begin = 0;` after this line to prevent false word creation.
